title: Operation 'Epic Fury': How Israel and US planned the strikes on Iran
description: In a surprise daylight operation dubbed 'Lion's Roar,' the US and Israel launched coordinated strikes near Iran's Supreme Leader's offices, signaling a potential end to diplomatic efforts on Tehran's nuclear program. President Trump vowed to dismantle Iran's missile industry and navy, emphasizing the elimination of imminent threats.

title: Speed, social media and showboating: A teenage menace on wheels
description: Fatal crashes involving young motorists, including minors, are a disturbing trend across India. Incidents in Goa, Delhi, Pune, and other cities highlight issues of excessive speed, underage drivers, and weak supervision. These tragedies underscore the urgent need for stricter enforcement and parental accountability to prevent future loss of life.

title: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy has a five-word reply for Jack Dorsey firing half of its staff
description: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy says he hasn't "really digested" Jack Dorsey's decision to lay off 4,000 employees — nearly half of Block's workforce — citing AI-driven efficiency gains. Jassy acknowledges that many jobs humans have done for decades won't need as many people going forward, but struck an optimistic note, saying new roles will emerge as they have with every past technology shift. He called it a "transition" period.

title: 'They just wanted to practice evil': After attack, Trump says Iran can never have nuclear weapon

This coordinated action, involving US forces, underscores rising regional tensions and Iran's nuclear program concerns.

description: A 22-year-old man was allegedly attacked by his female friend in Wazirabad, Delhi, on February 25. He claims she drugged him and then severed his genitals with a sharp weapon while he was asleep. The victim suspects the motive was related to his upcoming marriage.

title: Air India Express flight with 180 passengers stuck for 18 hours in Bengaluru
description: Passengers stranded at Bengaluru's Kempegowda International Airport protested after an Air India Express flight to Kathmandu was repeatedly diverted due to bad weather, leaving them waiting for more than 18 hours. About 180 travellers, including a Karnataka tour group, faced inadequate arrangements during diversions to Varanasi and Lucknow. The airline has offered hotel stays and options to reschedule.

title: Shoes outside! Silicon Valley startups adopt desi habit
description: A growing trend in San Francisco's tech scene sees employees leaving shoes outside office doors, a practice inspired by cultural norms. Startups like Cursor and Spur are adopting this policy, with leaders citing a desire to create a more comfortable, home-like atmosphere and practical benefits like cleanliness. This shift reflects the lingering influence of remote work habits on corporate culture.

title: Indian-origin woman in England loses all four limbs after dog lick
description: A Birmingham woman’s life was changed forever when a dog’s lick on a small cut led to a life-threatening sepsis infection. The 56-year-old endured multiple cardiac arrests and quadruple limb amputations.

title: Special court recommends dept inquiry against CBI IO
22-year-old walks into UP police station with nail hammered into head; father, brother booked
description: A 22-year-old man, Sunil Singh, walked into a police station with a three-centimetre iron nail in his head, alleging his father and brother assaulted him during a property dispute. He claims this is a repeat incident, with his family asserting he struggles with alcohol addiction and was sent for de-addiction treatment. Police have registered an FIR and are investigating.

title: Class 10 boy assaulted inside school van after board exam in Meerut; other students held at gunpoint
description: A 15-year-old student was brutally assaulted inside his school van by armed assailants on the Meerut-Hapur highway. The attackers, who held other students at gunpoint, allegedly attempted to kill the boy over a six-month-old dispute. Police have registered an FIR and are searching for the accused.
